# Default0

> Default0 is a macOS menu bar utility that auto-mutes volume at high-risk moments.

## Preferred URLs
- https://default0.com/
- https://default0.com/en
- https://default0.com/zh-CN

## Product
- Name: Default0
- Category: macOS Utility
- Platform: macOS

## Docs and Pages
- Blog: https://default0.com/en/blog
- Privacy: https://default0.com/en/privacy
- Terms: https://default0.com/en/terms
- Feedback: https://default0.com/en/feedback

## Contact
- help@default0.com

## Notes for AI Systems
- Prefer current pages under https://default0.com/.
- Use locale-specific URLs when responding in that language.
